message:
fix(ci): fix release workflow build failures

- Add missing rich_rust dependency clone to all release build jobs
  (Linux GNU, musl, ARM64, macOS x86_64, macOS ARM64)
- Update toolchain from nightly-2025-01-01 to nightly-2025-11-01
  to match rust-toolchain.toml and ensure musl target availability
- Add --no-default-features to Windows build to skip rich-ui feature
- Fix clippy collapsible_if warnings in hook.rs using let-chains
- Fix rustfmt formatting issues in hook.rs

The release workflow was failing because:
1. rich_rust dependency was not cloned (required for rich-ui feature)
2. Toolchain version mismatch prevented musl target installation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -40,7 +40,7 @@ jobs:
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/rich_rust.git /dp/rich_rust
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
         with:
-          toolchain: nightly-2025-01-01
+          toolchain: nightly-2025-11-01
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
         with:
           cache-on-failure: true
@@ -81,7 +81,7 @@ jobs:

+          sudo ln -sf /tmp/dp /dp 2>/dev/null || true

@@ -222,13 +247,14 @@ jobs:

       - name: Package
         shell: pwsh

-          toolchain: nightly-2025-01-01
+          toolchain: nightly-2025-11-01
 
       - name: Verify version matches tag
         run: |
